observed_tps: bootstrap-local txgen proved the target band can be reached at 6105.5 TPS steady-state over 10 minutes, but the first long baseline attempt later failed from bootstrap memory exhaustion; next topology revision uses a dedicated txgen host plus a supplementary miner on 10.0.4.30 with client-pool-size=32 max-inflight=3000 rpc-timeout-ms=15000 timeout-cooldown-ms=1000 timeout-cooldown-threshold=64
notes: 2026-04-22T01-33-57Z-2plus1: average cadence held but txgen entered late-run inflight saturation and mempool oscillation before recovering near the end; 2026-04-22T01-59-48Z-2plus1-refresh-tuned: earlier refresh bought more runway
column19: 000 mempool and relay was OOM-killed after ~706s while txgen degraded into RPC timeout storms; 2026-04-22T02-41-49Z-2plus1-backpressure-tuned: 650k/450k mempool hysteresis produced the first clean 10 minute run with 20.44 BPS overall
column21: and no relay OOM; 2026-04-22T02-56-46Z-2plus1-backpressure-resume500k: longer active duty cycle did not improve throughput and increased relay RSS
column22: so 650k/450k remained the preferred profile on the earlier tunnel-based setup; 2026-04-22T11-51-57Z-helper60pct: clean public-IP
column23: service-based rerun held 19.84 BPS on bootstrap and 19.83 BPS on relay over ~900s
column24: but that pass only validated cadence and miner shaping rather than txgen steady-state TPS; 2026-04-22T13-43-32Z-helper32-threshold64: direct public-RPC helper-host txgen improved the control loop and proved the new backpressure profile
column25: but it is not the intended final topology; 2026-04-22T14-13-39Z-bootstrap-local-startup: startup-inclusive 120 second bootstrap-local sample averaged 5113.0 TPS
column26: while the post-startup slices quickly climbed into the target band; 2026-04-22T14-16-12Z-bootstrap-local-steady: bootstrap-local txgen held 19.82 BPS and 6105.5 TPS for 10 minutes
column27: but the later overnight baseline attempt was aborted and the dedicated txgen host revision is now pending validation; 2026-04-23-dedicated-txgen-recalibration: dedicated txgen host fixed the TPS issue but miner shaping still needed work; 2026-04-23-supplementary-miner-tuning: 10.0.4.30 at 1 thread and CPUQuota=25% produced the best current dedicated-txgen profile at about 19.52 BPS and 6012.0 TPS; downstream smoke remains pending before Single-Downstream and Eight-Downstream scenarios
